tasks.title: Fix duplicate help text in CLI run command
evidence: run.rs:119-183 after_long_help contains duplicated content
Notes section appears twice (lines 128-136 and 145-153)
To change defaults section appears twice (lines 138-144 and 155-161)
Creates confusing help output for users
plan: Remove duplicate Notes section from after_long_help
Remove duplicate To change defaults section
Verify help text renders correctly with 'ralph run --help'
Check other CLI commands for similar duplication issues
Run 'make ci' to verify changes

tasks.title: Implement Windows custom sound support in notifications
evidence: notification.rs:182-191 play_windows_sound() has unused _custom_path parameter
Comment acknowledges: 'Custom sounds not yet supported on Windows via this API'
macOS and Linux have custom sound support; Windows parity is missing
plan: Research Windows sound APIs for custom notification sounds
Implement play_windows_sound() to support custom sound files
Use Windows API or external tool (afplay equivalent on Windows)
Test on Windows with various sound file formats
Update documentation to reflect Windows sound support

tasks.title: Reduce unwrap/expect usage in production code
evidence: Found 794 occurrences of unwrap/expect/panic/unreachable across 52 files
Many are in tests but some in production code could be proper error handling
Examples: runner/execution/process.rs uses .expect() on mutex locks
Examples: queue.rs has unwrap_or in format_id for number parsing
plan: Audit all unwrap/expect in production code (non-test)
Replace with proper Result propagation where possible
Use unwrap_or/unwrap_or_default for cases with sensible defaults
Add defensive error handling for edge cases
Run 'make ci' to verify no behavior changes

tasks.title: Add queue file size warning for large task lists
evidence: Queue loads entire JSON file into memory on every operation
No warning when queue grows beyond reasonable size
Large queues (thousands of tasks) may impact performance
No guidance for users on queue maintenance (pruning/archiving)
plan: Add size check when loading queue file
Warn user if queue.json exceeds threshold (e.g., 1000 tasks or 1MB)
Suggest running 'ralph queue archive' or 'ralph queue prune'
Add --quiet flag to suppress warning if desired
Document queue maintenance best practices

tasks.title: Add validation for task dependency edge cases
evidence: validation.rs:268-385 validates dependencies but has edge case gaps
No validation that dependencies are not in 'rejected' status
No warning for deeply nested dependency chains (performance risk)
No check for dependencies on tasks that will never complete (blocked)
plan: Add validation for rejected task dependencies
Add configurable max dependency depth check
Warn about dependencies on tasks with no execution path
Add tests for edge case dependency validations
Document dependency validation rules

tasks.title: Add export command for task data
evidence: No way to export task data for external analysis or reporting
Users may want to export to CSV, JSON, or other formats
Queue data is JSON but not easily consumable by spreadsheet tools
Useful for project retrospectives and metrics analysis
plan: Create 'ralph export' command with format options
Support CSV, TSV, and JSON output formats
Allow filtering by status, tags, date range
Include all task fields in export
Add examples to docs/cli.md

tasks.title: Fix TUI app state being too large and unfocused
evidence: app.rs is very large (exceeds 110KB, truncated in output)
App struct handles too many responsibilities
File size heuristic suggests it should be split (~400 LOC guideline)
Complexity makes testing and maintenance difficult
plan: Extract filter state management to separate module
Extract palette/command palette logic to separate module
Extract task builder state to separate module
Keep app.rs focused on coordination only
Run 'make ci' to verify no behavior changes

tasks.title: Add dry-run mode for task operations
evidence: No way to preview task operations before applying them
Users may want to see what 'ralph task update' would change
Risk of unintended modifications to task queue
Other CLI tools commonly provide --dry-run for safety
plan: Add --dry-run flag to task update command
Add --dry-run flag to task edit command
Show proposed changes without modifying queue.json
Use diff-like output to highlight changes
Document dry-run usage in docs/cli.md

tasks.title: Add task templates for common task types
evidence: Creating tasks from scratch is repetitive
Common patterns: bug fix, feature, refactor, test, documentation
Users may want pre-filled templates with appropriate tags/scope
Would speed up task creation and ensure consistency
plan: Create 'ralph task template' subcommand
Define built-in templates for common task types
Allow custom templates in .ralph/templates/
Support template variables (date, user, etc.)
Add template listing and preview commands
